item.title: Behind the scenes tutorial on how I made this Makima cosplay transition - YuzuPyon
item.description:
Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DO1KdP8EY3s I got requests on how I made my last Makima cosplay transition video, so here it is! When I say that I didn't use any special effects, I mean video editing effects such as overlay masks etc. So here I am showing you how I created the optical illusions and positioning tricks that gives the transition a smooth look. Wishing you a good day! Yuzu PART 2 BELOW
PART 2 HERE Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DO1KdP8EY3s I got requests on how I made my last Makima cosplay transition video, so here it is! When I say that I didn't use any special effects, I mean video editing effects such as overlay masks etc. So here I am showing you how I created the optical illusions and positioning tricks that gives the transition a smooth look. Wishing you a good day! Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: My first Isabella
item.description:
Isabella Rossellini in Death Becomes Her (1992) directed by Robert Zemeckis
Everyone waiting and hoping for her necklace to shift just a little bit raise your hand.
:::Raises hand:::
But I actually spent more time wondering how uncomfortable it would be for her to peel the necklace off after the scene was over, from all the glue they must’ve used.
Anyway, Ms. Rossellini was considered one of the most beautiful women in the world, with good reason (and she still is).
https://www.tumblr.com/tuserlivia/792881542493061120/isabella-rossellini-in-death-becomes-her-1992 The movie itself is entertaining as heck. Bruce Willis plays against type (and is awesome), Meryl Streep and Goldie Hawn are delightful, and the FX still holds up today.
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1484 (eels)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
"My hovercraft is full of eels."
There are two kinds of people....
Notice: this is a black vulture.
Actually, Maryland has the only dinosaur bone bed east of the Mississippi River. My friend is a paleontologist there.
I am getting the urge to play Age of Empires 2 again...
"My hovercraft is full of eels"
Birbs are the dinosaurs that made it.
Aaaaaaasaaaaaaaaa
Unhand us you monster
My hovercraft is full of eels.
I can't remember the last time I encountered a breakfast buffet outside a hotel. The hotel i stayed at briefly in Utah literally had a Pancake robot. That made exceedingly small pancakes. I should have took a picture of that thing. I'll also post a selection of pictures from that trip either later today or tomorrow.
Wink wink.
A red Phalarope on a map.
Yuuup
Whip a banker, throw a table, feed the poor.
I want to find and photograph a Burrowing Owl. Been too long.
Guess what: "My hovercraft is full of eels."
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin, who JUST crawled out of my shirt: "Okay. Morning. I love you too!" BONUS ANNOUNCEMENT: let's give @jessag87 some love. ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

I don't complain because beef jerky is not good for my health.
Go forth and spread the good word. Also tell him that Trump never won against a man.

item.title: As a Female Veteran, I. Am. So. Surprised. /s
item.description:
WASHINGTON, Sept 23 (Reuters) - U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has disbanded a committee that provided recommendations for women serving in the military, including on their well-being and treatment, alleging on Tuesday it had pursued a "divisive feminist agenda." The Defense Advisory Committee on Women in the Services was created in 1951 and provided advice on "recruitment, retention, employment, integration, well-being, and treatment of women" in the military, according to the committee's website. On Tuesday, a Pentagon spokesperson said Hegseth had decided to terminate the committee because it is "focused on advancing a divisive feminist agenda that hurts combat readiness, while Secretary Hegseth has focused on advancing uniform, sex-neutral standards across the Department." Sauce: https://www.reuters.com/world/pentagon-disbands-panel-military-women-alleging-divisive-feminist-agenda-2025-09-23/ #veterans #femaleveterans #femaleservicemembers
He said it before the election. ******************** ... Hegseth had argued his position was about maintaining military unit standards, citing physiological differences between men and women. "Everybody knows, between bone density and lung capacity and muscle strength, men and women are just different," he said at the time, while referencing a contested 2015 U.S. Marine Corps study about unit performance. Sauce: https://www.newsweek.com/pete-hegseth-clarifies-women-combat-roles-comments-senate-confimation-1998246
He said it during his confirmation hearing. ************************** “I’m straight up just saying we should not have women in combat roles. It hasn’t made us more effective. Hasn’t made us more lethal. Has made fighting more complicated,” he said in a podcast hosted by Shawn Ryan on Nov. 7. Women have a place in the military, he said, just not in special operations, artillery, infantry and armor units. In his book, he said women have performed well in dangerous support roles during war, but “women in the infantry — women in combat on purpose — is another story.” He adds, “women cannot physically meet the same standards as men.” He said, “Dads push us to take risks. Moms put the training wheels on our bikes. We need moms. But not in the military, especially in combat units.” Sauce: https://apnews.com/article/pete-hegseth-background-defense-secretary-confirmation-hearing-e160e10c86385a8beff110d9190fb34e
And when he fired Admiral Lisa Franchetti. ****************************************** Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth fired Adm. Lisa Franchetti, the Navy's first female chief, last week without any clear explanation -- part of a purge of top uniformed leadership that included the Joint Chiefs chairman, who is Black, and sent shock waves across the military. While he acknowledged Franchetti's "distinguished" career and thanked her for her service, he offered no explanation for why she was being replaced. That silence stands in stark contrast to his own words in a book published before his appointment as defense secretary, in which he lambasted Franchetti as unqualified, without specifics, and suggested she was elevated for political optics rather than merit. "Naval operations being weakened won't matter to anyone," he wrote at the time, adding that "politics is all about optics instead of results." Sauce: https://www.military.com/daily-news/2025/02/27/no-more-female-4-stars-franchetti-firing-leaves-top-ranks-filled-men.html
Oh, and don't forget Vice Admiral Shoshana Chatfield, the top military envoy to NATO. ************************************ United States Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed on Tuesday that he had fired the country's top military representative to NATO. A spokesman said that the decision was "due to a loss of confidence in her ability to lead." However, political analysts have pointed to a large scale purge of security officials appointed by the previous administration in favor of those loyal to current President Donald Trump. Part of the shakeup includes plans to slash the Pentagon's civilian workforce. Chatfield has had a distinguished naval career, including being the first woman to serve as president of the Naval War College. Sauce: https://www.dw.com/en/us-defense-secretary-fires-top-military-envoy-to-nato/a-72175077
He even tried to get rid of the Sexual Assault Prevention and Response program (SAPR). It's still being considered. ************************************************ Protect Our Defenders (POD) – the pre-eminent national human rights organization dedicated to ending sexual violence in the military – is calling for an immediate halt to the cancellation of Sexual Assault (and harassment) Prevention and Response (SAPR) programs across all military branches. Following President Trump’s directive eliminating protection and prevention programs for victims of rape and sexual assault, the Coast Guard, the Army, Navy, and Air Force have moved to dismantle critical anti-harassment programs and policies that protect service members from sexual assault and misconduct. Sec. Hegseth & military leadership are now claiming these programs are being “revised” rather than eliminated. However, the fact remains that these programs were explicitly included in an original cancellation directive. Sauce: https://theintercept.com/2025/04/14/pentagon-trump-sexual-assault-violence-military/ Sauce #2: https://www.protectourdefenders.com/statement-sexual-assault-prevention-programs-slashed-as-military-faces-recruitment-shortfall-updated/
He ended the Women, Peace & Security program. “WPS is yet another woke divisive/social justice/Biden initiative that overburdens our commanders and troops — distracting from our core task: war fighting,” Hegseth wrote in a social media post. “WPS is a United Nations program pushed by feminists and left-wing activists. Politicians fawn over it; troops hate it.” Sauce: https://www.militarytimes.com/news/pentagon-congress/2025/04/29/hegseth-cancels-womens-leadership-program-despite-past-trump-support/ There's more, bc of course there is, but that's enough for now.
I continue to be angry... and exhausted. But I like to remember that even as he tries to erase us, there is no way we're going to disappear. If you want to know about cool things women have done in/for the military: Famous Firsts: A Salute to Women in the US Military https://www.legion.org/information-center/news/women-veterans/2025/march/famous-firsts-a-salute-to-women-in-the-us-military Over 200 Years of Service: The History of Women in the U.S. Military https://www.uso.org/stories/3005-over-200-years-of-service-the-history-of-women-in-the-us-military First But Never Forgotten: Remembering 7 Women Veterans https://soldiersangels.org/first-but-never-forgotten-remembering-7-women-veterans/
item.dc:creator: StudioImArt

item.title: Friends moving out discover all the photos of myself I hid in their home.
item.description: Hidden behind framed art, under carpets, back of the linen closet...Many they found within one week. Prolly, the first 50-60. But I hid some hoping they wouldn't find them until today...the day they moved out. Because we live in different cities, I haven't been to their home in over a year. This is a long-term prank finally paid off.
item.dc:creator: RTK4740

item.title: Just a reminder that Fox News host Brian Kilmeade said homeless people should be murdered, and no one threatened to cancel or fire him.
item.dc:creator: CptCheesePants

item.title: It's easier to hide behind a dozen Andor memes than a single incident
item.description:
You know who doesn't get enough credit? The stunt team. Look at your boy there sell that hit.
There was originally a 5 season plan for Andor, one of the things I'm saddest about is we didn't get a full season of K2. But y'know, I recognise that shit wasn't plausible. The rate they were going, with all the delays, Diego Luna would have been like 60. Maybe one day they could animate their adventures in between the last two arcs of season 2. They disobeyed orders 17 times!
item.dc:creator: TheGhostofElizabethShue

item.title: Please please please please please please please please be true!!
item.dc:creator: Headcase444

item.title: Fox News host calls for violence against the UN
item.description: Hook me up with a Coffee if you are awesome! https://buymeacoffee.com/gridsquares Normalizing this type of rhetoric is not okay. Even if this is not a serious threat, this type of rhetoric being allowed from one of the main Talking Heads of an entertainment agency that is very closely tied to the conservative political movement is not okay. Also where are the Epstein files? https://youtube.com/shorts/mPxzjgcOS9M?feature=share
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: He wasn't faster than a speeding bullet, tho.
item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: I picked a great time to fly into the area
item.description: Third edit before my flight takes off: I was wrong about the TSA screening. There is an opt out and looks like I missed it in the rush. Sorry for the incorrect information in the second edit. Second edit: So another new fun thing that TSA does is facial recognition when you clear security. There is no option given and you’re either doing this or driving. It says it’s deleted after the scan but I’m waiting for a data breach news someday in the future to tell the truth. Edit: I caught another thread that confirms the guy in the right pic is wearing the AI glasses. The left is just an asshole who covers his face. Call them by their real name, pervert glasses by Zuck
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Disney cowed to the orange cunt instead of standing up for the first amendment. Disney royally fucked the fuck up.
item.description: If you DARE tell a comedian that they cannot say something because it will offend someone, they will scream that something at the top of their lungs right in that someone's face for the rest of their lives. Even four-year-olds know that. Hell, even Ted Cruz briefly joined the good guys by denouncing the cancellation of Jimmy Kimmel. That's how fucking stupid it was to try to cancel him. You know who taught Disney their lesson? We the people. The Disney+ cancellations are ongoing. But unfortunately, the orange cunt will not learn his lesson because he is incorrigible. He couldn't even pronounce acetaminophen correctly on the first try. Tylenol should sue the federal government. If he continues trying to go after other late night shows that deride him, it's just going to get more entertaining.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Corporate Translator Dump
item.description: Corporate Translator series by Under Studio. Good stuff, they have a ton of other good vids. Give them a look.
item.dc:creator: lemonofdoom2

item.title: I have no kids. And after all the kicks to the balls I've taken over the years, if I were to do have kids, they'd grow up to be the bad guys in "Wrong Turn."
